resources.string: Build workouts, drill combos, follow training plans — all stored locally on your device. No account needed, no internet required.
Create strength workouts with sets and reps, or build martial arts combos with timed rounds. Mix disciplines — striking, grappling, MMA, or general fitness.
Eyes on the drill, not the clock
The timer shows your combo or exercise name in full view. Auto-advance between rounds, or tap Done when you\'re ready. Pause, add time, or skip any round.
After each session your stats are saved. Return to any workout and see your previous performance side-by-side. Follow training plans and track your progress day by day.
Unlock achievements as you train — first workout, consistency streaks, volume milestones, and more. Every session counts toward your next reward.
A preference was corrupted and reset (%s)
